summary: Completed testing of 4 new features for InsureHub iteration 7. Backend tests: 15/16 passed (1 minor API response issue). Frontend tests: All features verified working after fix to PoliciesManagement.js.

minor.issue: Response doesn't return full entry object with policy_number field - only returns id, message, amount. Entry is created correctly with policy_number in DB.

passed_tests: Backend: PolicyType enum includes GPA and GTL
Backend: Create policy with type GPA - 200 OK
Backend: Create policy with type GTL - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/policies returns policy_type field
Backend: HR GET /api/endorsements returns only own submissions (data isolation)
Backend: Admin GET /api/endorsements returns all endorsements
Backend: HR GET /api/endorsements/import-batches filtered by submitted_by
Backend: GET /api/cd-ledger without filter returns all entries
Backend: GET /api/cd-ledger?policy_number=X filters entries by policy
Backend: POST /api/endorsements/preview returns rows with prorata_premium
Backend: POST /api/endorsements/import creates batch with import_batch_id
Backend: GET /api/endorsements/batch/{id} returns batch endorsements
Backend: GET /api/endorsements/batch/{id}/download returns Excel file
Backend: POST /api/endorsements/{id}/approve updates CD Ledger
Backend: All policy types (Group Health, Group Accident, Group Term, GPA, GTL) accepted
Frontend: Policies table shows Product Type column (after fix)
Frontend: Policy creation form has Product Type dropdown with GPA/GTL options
Frontend: Submit Endorsement - GPA policy restricts relationship to Employee only
Frontend: Submit Endorsement - GTL policy restricts relationship to Employee only
Frontend: CD Ledger has policy filter dropdown
Frontend: CD Ledger balance cards update when policy filter changes
Frontend: Import Batches page shows batches for Admin
critical_code_review_comments: PoliciesManagement.js was missing Product Type column and dropdown - FIXED by testing agent
POST /api/cd-ledger response could be improved to return full entry object for consistency
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/PoliciesManagement.js - Added Product Type column and dropdown

success_rate.backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed - 1 minor response format issue)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST-GPA-UI and TEST-GTL-UI policies with correct policy_type for testing GPA/GTL relationship restriction
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested and working: (1) GPA/GTL product types with Employee-only relationship restriction, (2) Full Excel import E2E flow with preview/confirm/batch view/download, (3) Policy-wise CD Ledger filtering, (4) HR data isolation. PoliciesManagement.js was fixed to add Product Type column. Test policies created: TEST-GPA-UI (GPA type), TEST-GTL-UI (GTL type).

feature_1_gpa_gtl_product_types.details: PolicyType enum includes GPA/GTL. Frontend dropdown shows all 5 types. GPA/GTL policies restrict relationship to Employee only with hint text.

feature_2_excel_import_e2e.details: HR uploads Excel → Preview shows data with premiums → Confirm imports → Admin sees batch in Imports tab → Admin can approve endorsements → CD Ledger auto-deducted → Admin can download batch Excel

feature_3_cd_ledger_policy_filter.details: CD Ledger has policy filter dropdown. Balance cards update when filter changes. Entries can be filtered by policy_number.

feature_4_hr_data_isolation.details: HR GET /api/endorsements returns only own submissions. HR GET /api/endorsements/import-batches filtered by submitted_by. Admin sees all.

fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing Product Type column in table and dropdown in form
fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.fix: Added policy_type to formData, added Product Type column to table header and body, added Product Type dropdown with GPA/GTL options
